brief: Louvre reopens after heist, Iran-US tensions escalate, Trump tariffs on Canada, and Saudi nuclear deal dominate news. Meanwhile, research on generative AI for dementia care and interactive visualization tools advance.
news_summary: The Louvre reopens after a crown jewel heist; Iran warns of retaliation against US threats; Trump escalates tariffs on Canada; House passes $1.5tn defense bill; Saudi Arabia secures a nuclear deal with the US; Tesla profits slide amid pivot to AI.
papers_summary: Papers explore generative AI for social connectedness in dementia care, interactive visual query tools for logic programming, and efficient neural rendering for volume visualization.

en.brief: Louvre reopens after heist, Iran-US tensions escalate, Trump tariffs on Canada, and Saudi nuclear deal dominate news. Meanwhile, research on generative AI for dementia care and interactive visualization tools advance.
en.news_summary: The Louvre reopens after a crown jewel heist; Iran warns of retaliation against US threats; Trump escalates tariffs on Canada; House passes $1.5tn defense bill; Saudi Arabia secures a nuclear deal with the US; Tesla profits slide amid pivot to AI.
en.papers_summary: Papers explore generative AI for social connectedness in dementia care, interactive visual query tools for logic programming, and efficient neural rendering for volume visualization.

zh.brief: 日本职场性别争议与金门情感工程引发讨论，特朗普法律纠纷与乌克兰政局变动持续。国际方面，沙特获美国核协议，特朗普关税威胁升级。
zh.news_summary: 日本鼓励男性穿短裤上班引发女性不满；金门居民对厦门翔安机场既期待又担忧。特朗普被令交出BBC诽谤案文件，乌克兰总统泽连斯基革除军总司令。

todays_image.caption: A stick pin, a small piece of jewelry, echoes the brazen theft of larger treasures from the Louvre.
todays_image.title: Stick pin
